span.p: Evaluation Pipeline Flow

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
div.span:
2. Tokenize & Align Labels
─────────────────
• Offset mapping
• BIO tag assignment
• -100 masking for special tokens

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
div.span:
3. Run Model Inference
─────────────────
• Forward pass → logits
• Softmax → probabilities
• Compute entropy/confidence
• Argmax → predictions

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
div.span:
4. Routing Decision
(if hybrid mode)
─────────────────
• Check uncertainty thresholds
• Check entity type
• Route to LLM if needed

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
div.span:
5. Compute Metrics
─────────────────
• sklearn.classification_report()
• Precision, Recall, F1
• Per-class breakdown
• Confusion matrix

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
div.span:
6. Generate Output
─────────────────
• Text reports
• JSON metrics
• Visualization plots

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
NVIDIA/Nemotron-PII
─────────────────
Split: train
Fields: text, spans (JSON)
Labels: first_name, phone_number,
credit_card, ssn, email, ...

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Babelscape/MultiNERD
─────────────────
Split: validation
NER benchmark dataset

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
WikiNeural
─────────────────
8 Languages:
en, it, es, de, fr, pt, nl, pl
Labels: PER, LOC, ORG, MISC

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
LabelMapper
label_mapper.py
─────────────────
NVIDIA → Model Mapping:
• first_name → GIVENNAME
• phone_number → TELEPHONENUM
• credit_card → CREDITCARDNUMBER
• ssn → SOCIALNUM
─────────────────
BIO Tag Conversion:
• is_start=True → B-TAG
• is_start=False → I-TAG

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
HybridEvaluator
─────────────────
Inherits: PlottingMixin
─────────────────
+ evaluate_comparison()
+ _tokenize_and_align()
+ _evaluate_single_sample()
+ _generate_comparison_report()

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
EvalConfig
─────────────────
model_path: str
output_dir: str
max_samples: 1000
context_length: 512
THRESHOLD_ENTROPY: 0.583
THRESHOLD_CONF: 0.787
use_selective_routing: True
block_continuation_tokens: True

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
HybridResult
─────────────────
true_ids: List[int]
baseline_preds: List[int]
hybrid_preds: List[int]
llm_calls: int
llm_corrections: int
llm_wrong_corrections: int
confidence_scores: List[float]
entropy_scores: List[float]
per_class_stats: Dict

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
NvidiaEvaluator
─────────────────
+ evaluate()
+ process_example()
+ _plot_cm()
+ _plot_efficiency_frontier()

+ name: str

• Hybrid Mode
(enable_llm=True)
• Hybrid+Selective
(use_selective_routing=True)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ExternalWrapper
─────────────────
• SpaCy (en_core_web_lg)
• Presidio (AnalyzerEngine)
• GLiNER (gliner_multi-v2.1)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
AblationRunner
ablation_study.py
─────────────────
Study 1: Uncertainty Measures
• Entropy Only
• Confidence Only
• Combined (E+C)
─────────────────
Study 2: Threshold Sensitivity
• Low: E=0.3, C=0.6
• Medium: E=0.5, C=0.7
• Default: E=0.583, C=0.787
• High: E=0.7, C=0.85
• Very High: E=0.9, C=0.95
─────────────────
Study 3: Routing Strategies
• No Selective Routing
• Selective Only
• Selective + I-Block

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
MultiSeedEvaluator
multi_seed_benchmark.py
─────────────────
Seeds: [42, 123, 456, 789, 999]
─────────────────
Statistical Methods:
• paired_ttest(model_a, model_b)
→ t-stat, p-value, Cohen's d
• bootstrap_ci(metric, n=1000)
→ 95% confidence interval
─────────────────
Output Format:
mean ± std [CI_low, CI_high]

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
MultilingualEvaluator
multilingual.py
─────────────────
Languages:
• Germanic: en, de, nl
• Romance: it, es, fr, pt
• Slavic: pl
─────────────────
Analysis:
• Per-language F1
• Transfer degradation
• Language family grouping
